task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Odoo application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or main interface is visible in a web browser, indicating successful authentication with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Calendar application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar view (daily, weekly, or monthly) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent located and selected the target meeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: A meeting titled 'Financial Planning - Bob Williams' scheduled for 2:00 PM (14:00) is visible on the calendar and clicked, opening its details popup or form view.
A deletion confirmation dialog for the meeting is being accepted, OR the calendar view for the target date (5 days from the current date) shows that the 2:00 PM (14:00) time slot is now empty.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with Odoo
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) is open and navigated to http://localhost:8069.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts or API calls to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing Python scripts, curl commands, or XML-RPC calls to delete the meeting.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual Odoo UI to delete the meeting
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Delete' button in the Odoo meeting form/popup rather than using browser developer tools to hide or remove HTML elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target system is Odoo 17 running at http://localhost:8069. The agent must log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin'. The meeting to be deleted is titled 'Financial Planning - Bob Williams'. It is scheduled for exactly 5 days from the current date at 14:00 (2:00 PM) and has a duration of 1.5 hours. The attendee is Bob Williams.
